steps.title: Use the scope clue
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize the scope of Basquiat's work. The relevant note is that he produced more than two thousand drawings and paintings, so the best sentence must make the large size of his output central.

steps.title: Keep focus on total output
steps.content:
• Choice A: Presents Untitled (Pollo Frito) as just one work within Basquiat's two-thousand-plus total.
  • Choice B: Shifts to the medium of one work.
  • Choice C: Focuses on the 2018 sale price.
  • Choice D: Focuses on auction details and materials.
The answer is A.
